name: The Gaze of Timaeus
name_jp: ティマイオスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>光</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Dark Magician" or "Dark Magician Girl" in your field or GY; Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck that mentions that monster as material, by shuffling it into the Deck as material (this is treated as a Fusion Summon with "The Eye of Timaeus"), but banish it during the End Phase of the next turn. You can only activate 1 "The Gaze of Timaeus" per turn.
eff: Target 1 "Dark Magician" or "Dark Magician Girl" in your field or GY; Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck that mentions that monster as material, by shuffling it into the Deck as material (this is treated as a Fusion Summon with "The Eye of Timaeus"), but banish it during the End Phase of the next turn. You can only activate 1 "The Gaze of Timaeus" per turn.

action: Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Reduces required number of Fusion Materials
Treats Special Summon as Special Summon with a different card
